name: Get GL Records from AP Module for SQL BI

content.query:
select distinct
ap.[Module]
,ap.BatchNumber
,ap.LineNbr
,ap.Account
,ap.Branch
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.GLTran_createdDateTime
,ap.GLTran_creditAmt
,ap.GLTran_debitAmt
,ap.PeriodID
,ap.GLTran_lastModifiedDateTime
,ap.GLTran_ledgerID
,ap.OrigBatchNbr
,ap.OrigLineNbr
,ap.OrigModule
,ap.ProjectTranID
,ap.GLTran_posted
,ap.GLTran_postYear
,ap.Project
,ap.CustomerVendor
,ap.RefNumber
,ap.GLTran_released
,ap.Selected
,ap.Subaccount
,ap.GLTran_summPost
,ap.ProjectTask
,ap.TaxCategory
,ap.TaxID
,ap.GLTran_tranClass
,ap.TransactionDate
,ap.TransactionDescription
,ap.GLTran_tranID
,ap.GLTran_tranLineNbr
,ap.MasterPeriodID
,ap.GLTran_tranType
,ap.GLTran_tranYear
,vm.[VendorID]
,vm.[VendorName]
from
ODS.ERP_GL_TRANSACTIONS ap
left join [ODS].[ERP_VENDOR_MASTER] vm on 
ap.CustomerVendor = vm.VendorID
where
ap.Module = 'AP'
